codeReview.summary: The follow-up fixes the prior blocking history regression. Instead of treating any transcript mutation as success, snippet history is now recorded only after the post-dispatch transcript delta contains ordered payload-specific proof derived from the dispatched snippet body, and the updated instrumentation covers both the prior false-churn case and a real payload-proof success path while the original coherence tests still cover relaunch, latest-content, ordering, and deletion behavior.

summary: Reviewed the prior failed feature diff (`a200cd22f567817d2e6cc6b0478d4201813c375b`), the follow-up fix diff (`efaa994c2ec20d8c284924b0868bdb2e08bf1b47`), the prior review, mission guidance, architecture, skill, and the fix feature transcript skeleton. The follow-up adequately addresses the original blocking issue: `dispatchIntoCurrentSession()` now waits for payload-specific transcript proof before calling `markExecuted()`, and the new instrumentation explicitly proves unrelated transcript churn no longer creates false successful history entries.
